\tzpentry{ID3512}{Cents Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3512 introduces Cents Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \text{cents} = 1200\log_2\left(\frac{32}{27}\right)\approx 294.135\ \text{cents}, \]
